title: Back pain follow-up
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Lists weight loss, fever, night sweats, malignancy, osteoporosis, weakness, gait instability, sensory change, bowel or bladder dysfunction, trauma, infection, injection drugs, corticosteroids, and recent spinal procedures.
red_flags.rationale: Supports clinician-assessed red flags for back-pain follow-up; it does not generate a decision.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Lists weight loss, fever, night sweats, malignancy, osteoporosis, weakness, gait instability, sensory change, bowel or bladder dysfunction, trauma, infection, injection drugs, corticosteroids, and recent spinal procedures.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15

red_flags.text: Defines urgent and specialist review for severe or night pain, infection, trauma, neurological deficit, urinary or faecal dysfunction, systemic disease, persistent symptoms, and selected imaging needs.
red_flags.rationale: Supports clinician-led referral documentation for back-pain follow-up; it does not generate a decision.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines urgent and specialist review for severe or night pain, infection, trauma, neurological deficit, urinary or faecal dysfunction, systemic disease, persistent symptoms, and selected imaging needs.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Acute Low Back Pain – 15

treatment_and_management.text: Supports acute low-back-pain terminology and pain site, onset, duration, severity, character, radiation, aggravating factors, injury mechanism, prior treatment, function, and patient concerns.
treatment_and_management.rationale: Supports Dubai virtual low-back history and assessment for back-pain follow-up; it does not generate a decision.
treatment_and_management.evidence_extract: Supports acute low-back-pain terminology and pain site, onset, duration, severity, character, radiation, aggravating factors, injury mechanism, prior treatment, function, and patient concerns.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Original diagnosis, duration, pain pattern, neurology, red flags, function, treatment, adherence, investigations and trajectory are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for back-pain follow-up.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
